app.title: Ruminant Vitamin & Mineral Premix Calculator
app.tagline: Dairy · Beef · Goats · Sheep — NRC / NASEM based
app.footer: Ruminant Vitamin & Mineral Premix Calculator · NRC/NASEM baselines · prices editable per product.

auth.tagline: Sign in to save and manage your premix formulations across devices.
auth.resetEmailSent: Password reset email sent. Check your inbox.
auth.privacyNote: Your premix data is stored under your account. Email is only used for login and password recovery.
auth.errEmailInUse: An account already exists for that email.
auth.errInvalidEmail: That email address is not valid.
auth.errPasswordShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.errTooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
auth.errDisclaimerRequired: You must read and accept the Terms of Use to create an account.

disclaimer.title: Terms of Use and Liability Disclaimer
disclaimer.intro: The Ruminant Vitamin & Mineral Premix Calculator is provided as an informational and educational tool. Requirement tables, maximum tolerable levels, product doses and warnings in this app are based on published NRC / NASEM references and label claims from listed manufacturers, and may contain errors, omissions or outdated values.
disclaimer.agreement: By creating an account and using this system, you agree that:
disclaimer.p1: You are the sole responsible party for every premix formulation you design, produce, or feed using output from this calculator.
disclaimer.p2: Any outcome — including animal deficiency, toxicity, poisoning, death, reduced performance, regulatory non-compliance, financial loss, or damage to feed, equipment, or property — is your sole responsibility.
disclaimer.p3: The calculator and its authors make no warranty of fitness for any particular purpose, completeness, or accuracy. Calculations, warnings, safety ceilings and tolerable levels are references only and do not substitute for professional veterinary, nutritional, or regulatory advice.
disclaimer.p4: You will independently verify every formulation with a qualified animal nutritionist and/or veterinarian before producing or feeding it, and will comply with all applicable local feed-safety, animal-welfare and labelling regulations.
disclaimer.p5: Product names, brand names, doses and notes are included as a convenience reference only and do not constitute endorsement or a guarantee of availability, purity, or label accuracy for your region.
disclaimer.p6: The authors, contributors and hosts of this calculator are released from any liability for direct, indirect, incidental, consequential or punitive damages arising from the use of this application or any formulation produced with it.
disclaimer.footer: If you do not agree to these terms, do not create an account.
disclaimer.accept: I have read and accept the Terms of Use and Liability Disclaimer above.

animalProfile.title: Animal Profile
animalProfile.marblingNote: Vit A restriction during finishing; Cr + biotin boost for insulin sensitivity.
animalProfile.colorNote: Vit E ≥150 IU/kg DM, Se ≥0.30 mg/kg DM for oxymyoglobin stability.
animalProfile.shelfLifeNote: Vit E ≥200 IU/kg DM, Fe/Cu capped to slow lipid oxidation in retail display.

cost.activeAndCarrier: Active ingredients {{active}} g + carrier {{carrier}} g = {{dose}} g dose

requirements.title: Daily Nutrient Requirements
requirements.subtitle: Per animal at {{dmi}} kg DMI — 100% = NRC baseline. Edit % to go above / below requirement, or untick to exclude.

organic.title: Organic Sources
organic.subtitle: pick the organic / chelated products you want to use
organic.help: Tick a product to include it. A mineral can be covered by only one organic source — conflicting rows are disabled. Blends credit every mineral they supply.

inorganic.title: Inorganic Sources
inorganic.subtitle: fills the remaining requirement per mineral

additives.title: Feed Additives
additives.help: Click a category to expand. Set g/head/day to include — dose × price feeds into total premix cost. Items that don't apply to {{species}} / {{stage}} are dimmed.

dryCow.title: Dry-Cow Milk-Fever Strategy
dryCow.subtitle: close-up / far-off dry only
dryCow.help: Pick the hypocalcemia-prevention approach. The selection adjusts premix targets (Vit D3 bump for DCAD / P-binder) and drops a tailored note into Applied Adjustments. With P-binder selected the X-Zelit additive dose auto-populates.
dryCow.xzelitHint: Typical 350–500 g/hd/d for the last 14–21 days pre-calving. Auto-populated to the X-Zelit additive row.
dryCow.maxCaHint: Hard to achieve with alfalfa-based forage. Best paired with cereal straws or corn silage.
dryCow.lowPHint: Target dietary P ~30 g/hd/d. No specific additive — manage through forage choice (low-P corn silage, minimise P-rich concentrates like DDGS/brewers grains).

delivery.title: Mineral Delivery — Daily (mg)
delivery.subtitle: Required per day = ration (external) + premix organic + premix inorganic

saveLoad.title: Saved Formulations
saveLoad.noSaves: No saved formulations yet. Save the current setup for quick recall.

help.title: Ruminant Premix Calculator — Help
help.footer: Help is written in English for technical accuracy. Use the language selector in the header for UI translation.
